title: Create: Redstone Recipe
description: Renewable Redstone for Create! This Create add-on adds recipe allowing you to fully automate Redstone production.
body: ## 🌱 About Create: Redstone Recipe is an add-on for the Create mod, available as both a mod and a datapack. It introduces a new recipe for Redstone, allowing players to renewably get Redstone dust. Available as both a mod and a datapack for all versions supported by Create. ## 📋 Recipe ![2x Redstone -> Mix Quartz, Glowstone Dust, Cinderflour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4440edeadd87f887f22aaa08d59cec218bf5aaa1.webp) Tip: Use [Just Enough Items(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To View The Recipe In-Game ## 🧩 Installation Guide **How to Install the Mod (.jar)** 1. Download the Mod: Get the .jar file. 2. Drop the File: Drag the downloaded .jar file into the mods folder. **How to Install the Datapack (.zip)** 1. Download: Get the .zip file for the Datapack version. 2. Open Your World Folder: 3. Install: Open the datapacks folder and drag the downloaded .zip file inside. ## 📦 More recipes for Create # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server? Check out Godlike Host! Setting up a server through them is the absolute best way to support us right now.
